away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

injuries.name: Amy Okonkwo
injuries.comment: Okonkwo will be held out in an effort to preserve the 12 games she's available to appear in while on a developmental contract. Her next chance to take the court will arrive Saturday against Washington.

injuries.name: Brionna Jones
injuries.comment: Jones was spotted getting some shots up after Thursday's morning shootaround. She's reportedly making good progress, but a timetable has yet to be established. The Dream are planning to be "very smart" with her return, Copeland adds.

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

injuries.name: Bree Hall
injuries.comment: Hall, who is currently signed to a developmental contract, will take a seat for Thursday's matchup. She has yet to appear in a game this season, so she can play in 12 games while on her current developmental deal.

injuries.name: Justine Pissott
injuries.comment: The Fever are preserving Pissott's eligibility under a development deal. Her next chance to make her WNBA debut comes Saturday, when the Fever take on the Liberty in New York.
